sections.paragraph:
Original: סתרה סתר

Transliteration: sêther sithrâh

Phonetic: say'-ther

BDB Definition:

  1. covering, shelter, hiding place, secrecy (noun masculine)
    1. covering, cover
    2. hiding place, shelter, secret place
    3. secrecy
      1. secrecy (of tongue being slanderous)
  2. shelter, protection (noun feminine)

Origin: from H5641

TWOT entry: 1551a,1551b

Part(s) of speech:
